description: AI assistant with RAG, web search, filesystem and memory. MCP sub-agent for Claude Code.
name: io.github.brunosrz/vectora

environmentVariables.description: Google Gemini API key (recommended free-tier LLM provider)
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Cohere API key — required for RAG embeddings and reranking
environmentVariables.name: COHERE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Tavily API key — required for web search and URL extraction
environmentVariables.name: TAVILY_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key (optional — alternative LLM provider)
environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key (optional — alternative LLM provider)
environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: LangSmith API key (optional — tracing and observability)
environmentVariables.name: LANGSMITH_API_KEY
